reviews.title: Poor Service and Poorly Maintained Hotel
reviews.text:
If I can give it negative stars, I would. 

1. No one to direct you to the check in counter which is lost among all the other counters at the hotel lobby

2. Hotel is about 30 years old or so and looks like it. Poor maintenance.

3. Staff's English is so limited that they don't know what is a concierge 

4. Hotel shuttle to the mall was not on time. Confirmed the waiting location several time, made me waited for an hour and I still didn't get onto the shuttle cos the driver claimed he didn't see me even though I was there 15mins beforehand.

5. Reception staff made half hearted attempt to attend to me. Had to repeat my request 3x before I get to confirm my room key can be used.

6. Almost non-existing Thai hospitality. This hotel has seen better days but there are much better choices on Phuket than this hotel now.

Thank you for taking the time to provide feedback on your recent stay.

While I regret that you were not able to experience our usual hospitality, I do hope that you will consider staying with us again in the future

Yours sincerely,
Guest Experience Team

reviews.title: hotel with zero security
reviews.text:
I stayed at this hotel with a friend and his wife. From the exterior the hotel is a standard one . However we were shocked out of our lives when one night the local phuket taxi guy started arguing for more money after having agreed to drop us at a certain price. When we questioned his position this chap started abusing loudly and rushed out of his cab towards us to attack us . My friends wife was shocked and asked him to stop this behavior to which he ran towards her and wanted to attack her.I saw the hotel security guards watching all this and shouted for help but these guys turned their back and went inside.We then understood no one is going to come for help and rather than fight in a foreign land we somehow managed to stop the argument and went to our room

Next day morning I reported this matter to the hotel manager who instead of apologizing and summoning their security guys for a explanation , explained that phuket taxi guys belong to a gang and hotel staff is afraid to speak to them and guests should avoid taking such taxis !!!!!!! 

If any one of u thinks that taking a 5 star will be secure for your family then do think many times before u even go near this hotel. These guys are not going to protect u in case  local thug attacks u and infact are going to be the frst to run away

I would suggest never ever stay at this hotel ...
reviews.positives: The Website was good but the hotel was a nightmare

reviews.title: Got poisoned by their butter chicken.
reviews.text: Well the title pretty much sums it up, we ended up ordering room service due to the heavy rain and grab was unavailable, so we ordered beef burger, butter chicken, fries, and masuman beef, kids and I mostly ate burgers and fries and a little of their curries, meanwhile wife had their curries. next day we checked out and had a splitting headache and nausea, my younger threw up and we blamed it on chips he been eating, wife and I held our urges to vomit thinking we were hang over from 2 beers, o boy the taxi ride and the plane ride the full force of food poisening hit us, when our 2 kids started throwing up, we were damn sure we aint hang over, none stop vomiting but wife got it even harder as she had most of the curry, So if you end up here avoid their room service or food.  And also room service is super poor, that make up room please sign on your door and you come back at night what ya know room aint clean, so you call em, they said ok ill notify the housekeeping and hour passes, you call em again and finally someone shows up and hastily  half heartedly cleans, ah also that complimentary bottle waters they supposed to give you 4 per day, unless you ask they wont restock or give you.  Calling their in-resort shuttle never comes, so you end up losing your shuttle to junceylon so we just ended up walking most of the time, and boy their rooms and to hotel lobby is quite a hike.  Overall super dissapointed.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Dulguun,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your detailed review. I sincerely apologize for your experience with the room service dish, which you believe may have caused food poisoning. Please be assured that we take such matters very seriously, and I will conduct a thorough investigation to prevent similar issues in the future.

Additionally, please note that symptoms of food poisoning typically manifest 24 to 72 hours after consumption. During that period, we did not receive any feedback, as many guests also dine in our restaurants.

I was surprised to hear your concerns about food poisoning, especially since you did not mention it during our conversation at check-out.

We also appreciate your feedback regarding room cleaning and the in-shuttle service. I will relay your comments to the relevant departments to ensure we make the necessary improvements.

We hope you are recovering well, and thank you again for your valuable feedback.

Regards,
KathGuanco

reviews.title: Horrible, overpriced, Dirty, Slow Staff, Full of bugs.
reviews.positives:
Two things : Location and Staff

Location and views are 10/10.

Lobby Staff / Concierge / Trip Booking staff were all amazing and very helpfull, and they are the reason i am giving this a 2 rating.
reviews.negatives:
Everything.

This is by far the WORST Hotel i've ever been to in my 10+ years of traveling.

I feel scammed, paid 4K $USD for a 8 Days stay. I would've given this 7 ratings if it was like 1K$.

Slow internet, DIRTY DIRTY Rooms, Old oudated TV/Air Con.

The position of the AC is RIGHT in front of the bed, so, if you turn it on, even at lowest speed, you FREEZE, if you turn it off, you burn...

BUGS, and i dont mean mosquitos or roaches, but a Lizzard, an actual lizzard and frogs INSIDE the room, we called the room service to remove them, more than once, and it took them 20+ Minutes to send someone...

Cleaning staff is actually SO SO BAD, they dont clean, they just remake the bed, thats it, they didnt even change towels, they just FOLD them... they left LEFTOVER food on the table.

Breafkest option was terrible, juices were NOT natural, and were never cold, Japanese rice was cold, the options to chose were so limited, bakrey was stale... we tried breakfest TWICE just to see if it was a bad day, nop, even worse than the first time.

Do yourself a favor and save your trip, DO NOT book this place. it's really not worth the price.

As stated before, this woul've been an OK stay if it was like a 100$ per night, but for a 300$+ a night hotel, it's straight up a scam.

AVOID AVOID AVOID like the plague.

reviews.title: Underwhelming
reviews.text:
The Novotel Phuket was quite disappointing and certainly shouldn't be labeled as a 4-star resort. Perhaps many years ago it would have qualified as a 4-star resort, but that currently is the case. The resort is clearly showing its age and the rooms are in need of remodeling. In general the rooms just feel "old." At the prices charged by the Novotel I believe that much better accommodations can be found elsewhere.

I would only recommend this hotel if traveling as a family. I would not recommend this hotel for those traveling either solo or as part of a group. Solo travelers seem to be eyed with suspicion by an over-zealous security team. Groups traveling to Phuket for partying are also likely to be singled out.

The most disappointing part was billing. First the hotel blocked a day’s fee which wasn’t mentioned in the listing. Then apparently the credit card details at their end did not match the actual card i used. So o had to pay this amount again and have to wait 21 days to unblock this amount. Then on top of that i was double charged the remaining amount and if I hadn’t been monitoring my card transactions, I wouldn’t have even known. 


The food was mediocre at best. Some of the items were stale. You get great food right outside of the hotel though. But you can miss the in room dining or breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
When we arrived (at 2PM)  they only had twin beds available, and was asked to wait 45 mins for a room with a double bed to be ready. Upon checking in to the room, there was only 1 towel for guests and had to call room service for another one. This happened again when we returned to our room one day and the room was cleaned but no new towels were given. We had to call housekeeping three times to bring us the towels cause they took so long (30 mins just for towels)
Overall the cleanliness was also disappointing. Even though the room was “cleaned”, we returned to just the bed being tidied and bins emptied. But you can tell the bathtub wasn’t cleaned.
Rooms look really old and outdated. (Not how they looked like in photos) and they TVs aren’t Smart TVs, barely had any good channels to watch.
Service in the cafe next to reception was also extremely slow.
Overall, very disappointed with my stay here.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your recent experience with us. We're truly sorry for the inconveniences you faced during your stay. 

We apologize for the delay in getting you the room you preferred and for the inconsistency in providing enough towels. Your comments about the room cleanliness and outdated facilities are concerning, and we'll take immediate action to address these to prevent similar problems in the future.

We're also sorry for the slow service you encountered at our Vlounge, and we'll be working closely with our team to improve their efficiency and make sure our guests have a better experience.

Your feedback is extremely important to us as it helps us identify areas where we can improve. We truly hope we can earn back your trust and have the chance to welcome you back.

Warm regards,
Kath Guanco
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Mixed customer service
reviews.text:
I was taken aback by the mixed treatment I got from their frontliners. 

Arriving at the hotel lobby we were greeted by a gorgeous view. And the guy who checked us in was really nice and personable. We were shown to our rooms and thought the room was ok. It wasnt wow, but it was fine. 

The breakfast buffet was average, ... bacon was too hard though, too cold ... 

We booked the Novotel shuttle going to JungCeylon mall and had no problem going there. But we only found out that we had to book the shuttle again to take us back. When we asked the driver if he could book for us instead he said no, we have to call the hotel. Even though it was going to cost us international roaming, we thought sure, it was our fault for not checking in the first place. So we called and confirmed our return shuttle at 3:15PM. At 3:15PM we approached the shuttle only to be told that they dont have us in their booking list. We told them that we have booked. The driver said we had to call. We asked if HE could check instead. He said he couldnt and that basically his job is to get the list from reception, go to the mall, check the list off and that's it. If you're not on the list, you cant get on the shuttle. We were frustrated and the guy ended up saying, that we could get on IF one of the bookings didnt show up. Sure enough, 3 rooms did not show up so we could go back. 

Somewhere along this shuttling I left my iphone in the shuttle and the driver promptly returned it to us so at least that was a plus and made us not complained to the management. 

When we checked out the next morning, I asked if needed to save some cash for any airport tax. The thai reception guy said he didnt know. And even though there was a western novotel employee who was definitely within earshot, neither of them wanted to help each other. The Thai recep guy kept on saying he didnt know and that we should check there. 

The level of service in this Novotel made me not want to go back to Phuket or Novotel again.
reviews.positives: Great view from the lobby looking down patong beach, really close to the beach

reviews.title: It's a 7-Eleven in disguise
reviews.text:
The Novotel Phuket resort is on a hill atop Patong Beach, atleast thats what they claim.

Located on the end of Patong Beach, with more rocks than water or sand, the hotel lobby has a beautiful view of the sea.

They don't offer 4/5 star service, expect to be asked to pay for plates, cutlery or even a bucket of ice to be delivered to your room.

The rooms are a bit cramped, and even basic amenities like ping-pong paddles unavailable after 7PM.

The breakfast spread is decent, the common pool is decent, and the rooms with exclusive pool access are good but definitely not value for money.

The hotel feels old and its policies seem ancient. I hope they can reinvent themselves.

reviews.title: They made us miss our flight!
reviews.text:
the location wasn't great.  it was atop a hill between patong and kamali beach and was often difficult to get a cab there.  cabs also charged extra because it was 'up the hill'.
we had a nice meal at the all you eat sunday seafood night.
there were too many stairs to drag your bags up and down and in parts it wasn't well lit.
other than a convenience store there wasn't much else to do within walking distance.
on our last day we asked for a wakeup call to get our flight.  you guessed it - they didn't call.  we missed our flight by an hour.  as we were rushing to do our checkout all they cared about was whether we had taken anything from the mini-bar!
we did 4 tours on the 4 days we stayed there and they should introduce a system of working out who is doing which tour. everyone sits out the front on the stairs as vans pull up and men speaking broken english attempt to pronounce first or surnames.  there has to be a better way to do this.

reviews.text: we stayed for 2 nights over the easter holidays.  i had 2 rooms, as we have 3 kids travelling with us.  the baby cot was comfortable, came with pillow and boster and quilt.  it was a shame that they were unable to provide us with connecting rooms.  they gave us a room with a view, but it's on the 3rd floor.  and there's no lift - we had to climb up 3 storeys up to the rooms every day.  i did request for a change, as the aircon in one of the rooms was noisy.  the manager was very nice to accomodate me, but the alternative room which she showed to me was facing the tennis court and had a musky smell in it.  so we decided to stay put.  the hotel staff was all very helpful and friendly.  we had no trouble booking the spa, and free transport to the shopping centre in patong.  however, transport on the taxi or tut tut was rather expensive.

reviews.text: I think for $165/night in Thailand, I needed luxury. This hotel was just okay to me, 3 star at best. I found a hair in the shower, which wasn’t worth complaining about. The rooms are outdated. The breakfast options are  geared towards the western palette, the Thai food looked boring and wasn’t freshen up enough.  Got tired of it after 4 days. The pool was my favorite part and the staff were great! Cars to take us up and down the hill. The walls are very thin and if your room is near the main road driving into Patong, you will definitely hear loud horns and shouting!! I had to call about a noise complaints on one of the nights. Overall, the value for money just wasn’t there for me.

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.text:
The hotel itself is in a beautiful location, clean and well-maintained, and we appreciated being able to extend our check-out by a few hours (we were happy to pay the extra). That flexibility made our last morning more enjoyable, and for that we were grateful.

However, a few key things really impacted our overall experience. Firstly, on our last day, I was in the room getting changed when two men suddenly appeared on our balcony to do pressure washing (karcher). We received no warning or communication about this maintenance work, and all of our clothes drying outside were soaked and left dirty from the spray. It was extremely intrusive and left us with wet, stained clothes to pack for our trip home.

Secondly, the activities in the kids club needed to book in advance. I understand some of them required booking but i didn’t know the whole time table with activities required advance booking. Again, no communication or signage, just another frustrating example of poor organisation and lack of clarity from staff.

While the setting and facilities were nice, these experiences left us feeling disappointed. Personally, I wouldn’t return to this hotel, as I value clear communication and guest respect which sadly were lacking here.
reviews.response:
Dear Sophie,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We’re glad to hear you appreciated our beautiful location, cleanliness, and the flexibility with your check-out time.

However, we sincerely apologize for the unexpected maintenance on your balcony without prior notice, and for the inconvenience caused by the pressure washing. We understand how intrusive and frustrating this must have been, especially with your clothes being affected.

We also regret the lack of clear communication regarding the kids club activities and booking procedures. Your feedback highlights important areas where we need to improve our organization and guest communication.

We truly value your comments and will use them to enhance our services. While we’re sorry to hear you would not choose to return, we hope you might reconsider in the future so we can provide the respectful and clear communication you expect and deserve.

Thank you again for your honest feedback.

Best regards,
Kath G

I called the room service, they asked me to call engineering. They couldn't understand what I was asking and my daughter was yelling away because she wanted milk. Stayed for 7 days 6 nights, every morning the western breakfast is EXACTLY the same. Certain staffs seemed racist. We booked couple massage the day before leaving. The masseuse actually slept while massaging. The Massage is a total failure, plz do not take it! The street side ones are 1000 times better. They denied when questioned. Even to ask for extra towels, the staffs will question u. Even if u ask for additional water, they will question. The stay was good but not for long stays. Overall Massage was bad.

The restaurant food was OK, my Thai companion found it a little bland, so we only ate there once, maybe the food is cooked more to satisfy western tastes ?

Swimming pools were clean & had bar service, the bar staff were great.

It is a little far from Bangla Rd, but a taxi will only cost 200BHT each way.

Booking a taxi from reception is expensive, (to the airport or Phuket Town for example), much better to walk down to the beach & get one.

reviews.title: Only for location but room maintenance not worth for the money
reviews.text:
Novotel is a big brand, which means we expect lavishness but you don't find that lavishness here in Maintanance but prices are super high.

Positives:
Great Location, Views, Swimming Pool, Outdoor maintenance and Outdoor staff, Breakfast is just ok

Negatives:
* 1 star for Room service, they forgot their brand value... they didn't even refill the items which are leftover previously.
* Walking paths very hard, some places are not movable by trolley... its easily breakable... 
* Deposit: They are saying they will need minimum 15 to 31 days to release, its too worst... 
* Hotel is steap up on the hill, there is no easy access to go to room... you always need to wait for vehicle to go inside or outside the hotel which is not easy and no direct path to go outside...
reviews.response:
Dear Nagesh,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We really appreciate you taking the time to let us know about your experience.

We're happy to hear that you liked the location, the views and the outdoor areas. We're sorry to hear that the room service and maintenance did not meet your expectations. This is not the experience we want our guests to have.

Your feedback is very helpful and reminds us where we need to do better. We hope to welcome you again in the future and give you a better experience that matches the Novotel standards.

Warm regards,
Kath Guanco
Guest Experience Manager

Except for food and diner the resort scores well on all departments.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We had a very pleasant stay. We travelled with our 3 year old together with another couple with toddlers. The check in staff and security guards were great. However, there were 2 particular staff at the coffee house that was rude during lunch and dinner. The morning staff at the coffee house was great! We had 2 incidents that a waiter and waitress was rude to us. Apart from that it was a wonderful stay! Rooms were great and check in, security and housekeeping staff was wonderful. Will definitely go back to stay! Location is central enough to go out for food but quiet as it was at the end of patong beach. Beach was nearby, opposite the hotel which made it convenient.

reviews.title: Good time at Novotel Phuket Resort
reviews.text: My wife and I had a great time staying at Novotel Phuket Resort. Its is only 10-15 minutes walking distance (down the hill) to the Patong beach. We stayed at the superior double ocean view room. The staff are friendly and helpful. The 3-level swimming pool have the great view of Patong beach. There's a shuttle service to Jungceylon shopping mall every hour which is very convenient. There's also tour agent and taxi counter at the lobby if you want to book for tour around Phuket. We find it useful. We shall definitely recommend this hotel to everyone.
reviews.positives: 3-level swimming pool, variety choice of breakfast buffet and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Hotel away from the hustle bustle but walking distance to Patong
reviews.text:
The hotel was located on top of the hill, but any transportation should have brought you up there. The staff was warm, cheerful and extremely friendly and helpful. Especially a big thumbs up to the front desk girls and a young gentleman which I believe is their manager. Upon arrival we were served with a welcome drink and a chilled towel. Luggage assistance was offered as our room was located a few flights of stairs down. The down side is the room needs some refurbishment as it is old and lighting is dim. We have rooms with bunk beds and there aren't any lights near there. 
The buffet spread was good and there is a bit of everything you can expect from a normal international buffet. There is also a kids corner with kids cups and cutlery. If I can suggest, the management might want to consider changing the drink jug with a screw cap at the kids corner to a dispenser with taps so the kids can gain access to the drink without asking the parents for help. The restaurant is big, and the table is also very spacious. There are choices of outdoor seating available with a magnificent sea view.
There are 3 outdoor pools on the 3 tier of the hill, each having a different depth for adults and kids. As it is summer, the water in the pool was warm and comfortable to swim in. The hotel also has a lot of activities for hotel guests,but we didn't use it much as we have a lot of activities outside the hotel instead. 
Our room was allocated at the bottom of the hill which has a very convenient backdoor allowing my family to visit Patong beach without navigating from the main entrance.

reviews.text:
Overall, I liked the hotel. Staff were nice, bed was good, and the room was clean. main problem was the ants - not a lot, but they would appear occasionally in various parts of the room.

The main complex is at the top of the hill which is a short climb, but they have a shuttle to take you up and down the hill as well as an elevator near the entrance. 

The pool was good, and there was a gym with a variety of equipment.

The hotel is at end of of Patong Beach and far from most of the restaurants and major activities. Its near a 7-11 though. If you are looking for something quieter and more relaxing, this hotel is a good choice.
reviews.response:
Dear Michael,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re pleased to hear you enjoyed the clean room, comfortable bed, and friendly service, as well as the pool and gym facilities.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the ants. This is not the experience we aim to provide, and our team is addressing this with enhanced pest control measures.

We appreciate your comments about our location and are glad the shuttle service added convenience during your stay.

Thank you again for your review, and we hope to welcome you back for an even more comfortable experience.

Warm regards,
Kath Guanco
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Very Good with some comment جيد جدا مع ملاحظات بسيطة
reviews.text:
---

لقد قضينا خمسة أيام ممتعة في فندق نوفوتيل بوكيت ريزورت. بشكل عام، كانت تجربتنا إيجابية، وأود أن أشارك بعض الملاحظات:

من حيث النظافة، كانت التجربة بالنسبة لي ممتازة، ولكن زوجتي اعتبرتها جيدة فقط. بالنسبة للفعاليات المقدمة للأطفال، كانت بسيطة ولكنها فقيرة إلى حد ما، ونأمل أن يتم تحسينها في المستقبل.

الحمامات السباحة كانت نظيفة، ولكن لاحظنا عدم وجود شخص مخصص لمراقبة الأطفال حول المسبح، وهو ما اعتبرناه نقطة ضعف تحتاج إلى معالجة.

موقع الفندق رائع ويعتبر واجهة سياحية مميزة. ومع ذلك، الفندق يقع على مسافة مرتفعة قليلاً، مما يجعل الصعود إلى الأسواق الجانبية مرهقاً بعض الشيء. لكن من الجدير بالذكر أن الفندق يوفر خدمة النقل (الشتل) التي تساعد في التنقل إلى الأعلى والأسفل بسهولة.

أما بالنسبة لمطعم الإفطار، فقد كان متنوعًا ويقدم وجبات كثيرة تناسب جميع الأذواق. من حيث النظافة، كان المطعم جيد جداً، وكذلك نوعيات الأكل المقدمة. وأفضل ما في المطعم هو أن الركن الخاص بتحضير البيض كان خارج المطعم، مما ساعد في تجنب التصبغ برائحة الأكل بعد الانتهاء من الطعام.

بشكل عام، الفندق جيد وسعره معقول عند الإقامة مع الأطفال. ولكن نعتقد أنه قد يكون هناك فنادق أخرى بنفس السعر تقدم فعاليات أكثر للأطفال.

---

**Translation:**

We spent five enjoyable days at Novotel Phuket Resort. Overall, our experience was positive, and I would like to share a few observations:

In terms of cleanliness, the experience was excellent for me, but my wife considered it only good. As for the activities offered for children, they were simple but somewhat lacking, and we hope they will improve in the future.

The swimming pools were clean, but we noticed there was no lifeguard to supervise the children around the pool, which we considered a weakness that needs to be addressed.

The hotel's location is great and is a prominent tourist spot. However, the hotel is situated on a slightly elevated area, making it a bit tiring to climb to the nearby markets. However, it is worth mentioning that the hotel provides a shuttle service to help guests move up and down easily.

Regarding the breakfast restaurant, it was diverse and offered a wide range of meals suitable for all tastes. In terms of cleanliness, the restaurant was very good, as was the quality of the food served. The best part about the restaurant is that the egg cooking station was outside the restaurant, which helped avoid lingering food smells on our clothes after finishing the meal.

Overall, the hotel is good and reasonably priced when staying with children. However, we believe there may be other hotels with similar pricing that offer more activities for children.
reviews.response:
Dear Abdulrahman, 

Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback about your recent stay at Novotel Phuket Resort. We’re pleased to hear that you had an overall positive experience and enjoyed the hotel's location, cleanliness, and diverse breakfast options.

We appreciate your comments on areas where we can improve. We’ll certainly look into enhancing our children's activities and the presence of a lifeguard around the pool for added safety. Your feedback about the shuttle service and the egg cooking station is also valuable, and we're glad it contributed to your comfort.

Thank you for bringing these points to our attention. We aim to continually improve our services and hope to have the opportunity to provide an even better experience during your next visit.

Warm regards,
Kath Guanco
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.text: Me and my children go to Phuket every year and so are familiar with the beaches and different hotels. This is our first time staying at Patong and Novotel. In terms of the location it was good for us because we were away from the nightlife areas which we didn't want to be too close to. The roads however, at the bottom of the Hotel are probably the worst part about the location. This would be the only negative thing. The hotel is situated on a hillside and so it gives great views over the sea in the beach and the sunsets are stunning. The room was spacious and we were greeted with welcome fruit basket and some welcome snacks which was nice and not expected. The Hotel staff were always very helpful and friendly. The Gym is well equipped and spacious. The pools are nice. We particularly enjoyed the tropical pool which is deeper. The breakfast was very good with lots of options. The hotel is very kid friendly and I definitely would've brought my kids there when they were younger.

Your kind words about our kid-friendly facilities mean a lot, and we hope to welcome you and your family back for another memorable stay in the future!

reviews.title: Nice hotel with friendly staff and good location.
reviews.text:
I've had 8 days in Novotel resort and are really amazed with what they could offer for only $60/night. The rooms are clean and nice, though the bathrooms could have been a bit bigger.

The pools are great and I got my workouts done in their gym which were OK. Not the newest equipment but they were high quality and definitely did the job.

The location was great in the sense that the hotel is nice and quiet, and still only a walk away from Bangla road where all the fun and night life are. 

The staff are friendly and helpful, though not fluent in English. But no communication problems what so ever.

It's absolutely not a hotel for disabled people as the lowest rooms are at about 25 meters over the sea level while the top ones about 250 meters. It was a good climb up to the room which I did not mind at all. I enjoyed the landscape and the beautiful setting that it provided.

All in all a great experience at a good price. Would not hesitate to visit again.

reviews.negatives: They charged me for internet which were included in the price through Agoda and had difficulties getting them to take it of the bill.

reviews.title: Great Hotel, Nice Buffet, Great Service
reviews.text:
Great stay I'd say, depending on what you are looking for. It's at the north-end of Patong beach. If you like people on the beach, this may be a little far. But if you like sunbathing without the crowd, you got it. 

Minimart is just across the hotel. Some great food along the road too, not too many though, since it's at the north-end.

The hotel has a huge range of activities, you can join mostly for free, including sport classes, cooking class, painting etc. The massage is good too.

Will I return, yes.

reviews.title: a quiet place
reviews.text:
I like its location at the north tip of Patong Beach. If being in central Patong, it would be too noisy. Here it is quiet. You can go to central Patong by walking on the beach within half an hour. Since the sea view is nice, you don't feel boring.
The hotel area is quite big and in delicate design. It has a 3-layer-swimming pool, and beside it there are a sea food restaurant and small pub, all with a sea view. This pool area is what I like most.
The buildings and rooms are nice, deserving Novotel's global image. The price is ok, a little bit high. Generally, if you don't fancy so much on Phuket nighlife, Novotel is your place.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel,  amazing views but booking problem
reviews.text: Great hotel but on the side of a hill so you need to catch the complimentary tuks tuks up the hill.  They always seemed to be available though. We were put into a suite although didn't feel we got to use the facilities at all as we were there less than 24 hours.  Breakfast was excellent and it  looked as though they had a good kids club and activities.  I'd stay again but would want my booking confirmed prior by hotel.

reviews.title: Great Time in Phuket
reviews.text: My brother and I chose this hotel for our short vacation in Phuket based on the reviews we had read and we were very pleased with our decision. We were greeted by a very friendly receptionist who showed us to our room and helped us with all our questions over the next two days. The room was clean and had everything we needed plus a great view of the beach. We enjoyed the pools at the hotel and the ease of getting down to the beach/shops/restaurants. My only complaint is the price of the dinner buffet at the hotel. While the food was great, the price was incredibly high and left us wishing we would've gone elsewhere to eat. The hotel was very helpful about holding our bags after we checked out and helping us place a couple of phone calls. I will definitely stay here if I return to Phuket.
